title: Single Sleep Mod
description: Allows only one player to go to sleep to progress the night on a server
body:
## Single Sleep for Fabric

A lightweight solution for multiplayer servers where not everyone sleeps at the same time!

### Features

*   **One-player night skip** - Just one bed needed!
*   **Thunderstorm support** - Also skips thunderstorms!
*   **Server-side only** - No client mod required!

  

### Installation

1.  Download the JAR
2.  Place in your server's `mods` folder
3.  Restart server
